package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for pgxpool_acquire_in_loop: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated pgxpool acquire calls inside loops that may churn pooled resources.
type CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopModel
}

type CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopService struct {
    repo *CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePgxpoolAcquireInLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePgxpoolAcquireInLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "pgxpool_acquire_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    pool, _ := pgxpool.New(ctx, c.Query("dsn"))
    for _, item := range items {
        conn, _ := pool.Acquire(ctx)
        _, _ = conn.Exec(ctx, "SELECT 1 FROM accounts WHERE id = $1", item.ID)
        conn.Release()
    }
    pgxpool_acquire_loop_positive := map[string]int{"pgxpool": 1, "acquire": 2, "loop": 3}
    pgxpool_acquire_loop_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    pgxpool_positive_0 := pgxpool_acquire_loop_positive["pgxpool"] + len(input)
    _ = pgxpool_positive_0
    acquire_positive_1 := pgxpool_acquire_loop_positive["acquire"] + len(input)
    _ = acquire_positive_1
    for loop_positive_2Index, item := range items { pgxpool_acquire_loop_positive[item.ID] = loop_positive_2Index }
    return nil
}
